説明文: It is very hotheaded by nature, so it constantly seeks opponents to battle against. Its aggression will not be quelled if it doesn’t win.

特性.効果: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may take aEnergy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your ActivePokémon.

0: Mega Charizard X ex,                                         Charizard,                                         Charizard ex,                                         Mega Charizard Y ex
